name: custom-label-bar
description: Horizontal bar chart with custom labels inside bars and values displayed outside

yAxisData.name: yAxisData
yAxisData.description: Y-axis labels. Can be a string array or object array with label and value. Example: ['0', '50', '100'] or [{label: 'Low', value: 0}, {label: 'High', value: 100}]

data.name: data
data.description: Array of numeric values for each bar. Example: [100, 200, 150, 300]

primaryColor.name: primaryColor
primaryColor.description: Color for the primary (data) bars. Example: '#3b82f6'

secondaryColor.name: secondaryColor
secondaryColor.description: Color for the secondary (helper) series used for positioning labels. Example: '#10b981'

barWidth.name: barWidth
barWidth.description: Width of the bars as a percentage string. Example: '40%'

barGap.name: barGap
barGap.description: Gap between bars as a percentage string. Example: '10%'

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}
